text.font-family: "Roboto", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR
"Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Autism affects how people communicate, interact with others, and experience the world around them. Because it varies from

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: person to person, it's often called Autism Spectrum Condition (ASC).

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Many adults live with autism, whether diagnosed early in life or later on. It's a lifelong condition, and while there's no cure, the

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: right support can make a big difference. Some people may find social situations challenging or feel overwhelmed by busy

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: environments. Others may have strong interests or routines that help them feel secure.

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Support is available to help with everyday life — from understanding and managing social interactions, to accessing work,

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: education, and community activities. Services like speech and language therapy, occupational therapy, and tailored support

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: plans can help adults with autism live more independently and confidently.

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR
"Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Send feedback directly to the content team using our website feedback form. You can also join our user research

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: group to receive invites to activities and surveys to help shape future improvements to the site .

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Find out how to get an adult autism assessment and where to get support

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: If you have a diagnosis for autism and need practical support at home or

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: in the community contact Adult Social Care for a

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR
"Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: Find local groups to build skills and reduce isolation

"Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: to discuss a referral to the Adult Autism

g.text: We make a commitment to making our website

text.font-family: "Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR
"Arial", Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: We are improving our website and value your feedback to better meet your needs .

g.text: Some people are autistic and have a learning disability .
